hf3730b95g64cdg4a41ga2f7g04f62a9b42e5: Well, get on with it. Whatever you are.
h507a7123g9f38g4894ga956gaca6c4dda537: I'm a deep gnome, you're a drow. You helped me, now you plan to enslave me.
h1e1ec70cge244g4e4bga926g413be5865d12: What, then? Torture? Blood sport? Or perhaps just a good old-fashioned walloping?
h82bde188g928fg4f68g824cg3892648c0e41: I freed you. A little compensation would be nice.
ha67f4e2fg1775g45f3gaa15gc14539ed2115: I freed you. A little compensation would be nice.
h368ee86dg772bg45b4gb495g347013ce487a: As expected. Coercion by the book.
h95adf2e7g941fg4e6cg9035g637c9636c9b7: Take my pack if you can find it. The only reason those goblins caught me was its weight. I'll travel lightly from now on.
ha89b8f7bg4a76g46fegb2b4g64806b4847e1: Wait - you do not look like a surface creature. Why are you here?
h7b722c48gff3bg4b15g8501gf0a9fda9e0fe: You're a little far from home for a deep gnome.
h23184fe4g90d8g46dfgbd61g94ce8d3fd4b8: Ignorance is alive and well, it seems! Deep gnomes aren't restricted to the Underdark, you know - I've lived in Baldur's Gate for years.
h077489c3g3a31g4b20g9385gf917fe3f8c8a: I'm in search of a friend. I fear he's in trouble. See this? I gave it to him years ago before I left home.
h1d2a2529gd202g4e30ga8deg79b7e0c49392: I found it around the neck of a thug in the Lower City. It was speckled with blood, my friend nowhere to be found.
h126f7adcgc2f3g450fg906dg6728f6ce8737: But I still have hope. I'm heading to his home in the Underdark to discover what happened.
hed351d91ge089g4a68g8853ge8d149e970d7: On that note, I bid thee a farewell. If we should meet again... well, we will have met again.
h204b5be1g0578g4800g9e5agadab65a6dcfc: I'm in search of a friend. I fear he's in trouble. He had this locket, see, that I gave him years ago before leaving home.
h62d5dd7dg1ef3g43b8g85b9gb480bb9b6aa3: I found it around the neck of a thug in Baldur's Gate. It was speckled with blood, my friend nowhere to be found.
hff7a5ed0ga224g43fega4dcg25ad35fa9da8: But I still have hope. I'm heading to his home in the Underdark to discover what happened.
h5e669f3ag5b93g4ee9g8564g99694a0584e3: On that note, I bid thee a farewell. If we should meet again... well, we will have met again.
hd3644e55g1c2cg42cbgaf65g16333af4699c: Compensation? Is that all? I expected worse from the likes of you.
h9c91b0f6g3fd4g4e83g8546g05818ccb0bce: You've only met Lolth's drow, it seems.
h850bd12eg0436g4318gb1fdg22765d6d33ac: Is that what you think of drow?
h8968061fgb221g4e98g8cb7g503d5f73bdaf: I'd rather know how you got caught.
h72692f28gc76fg47dcg9923g3879a2e633b0: My own fault, really. I should have dropped my pack and outrun those bastards. Alas.
h95f55b68g45d0g4a58gb7d0gf3919cea2b01: I could extort you, if that's what you want.
ha08da6f8gd153g4170gaaf4g25a0b97f6af1: You're teasing me now. I'm certain of it.
h1d71b794ge69dg45b0ga338gec462a574674: You're free to continue on your way.
h5907fe8dgbdc3g4f44gbb74g2149d7d86c33: I'm a deep gnome, you're a grey dwarf. You helped me, now you plan to enslave me.
h9811807cg3143g49dfg9b4dg28f3aaf9386b: Is that what you think of duergar?
h4725e4fcgc920g4600g8237g087f07f2ed85: You saved me. Now you'll extort me. That's how this works, yes?
